items.title: Profitability Analysis

items.title: Automated Reports
items.description: Generate detailed reports for stakeholders instantly. From yield predictions to resource usage, get the data you need.

faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.description: These are the most commonly asked questions about AgroMap. Can't find what you're looking for? Chat our friendly team

freeTrial.question: Is there a free trial available?
freeTrial.answer: Yes, you can try AgroMap for free for 31 days. If you want, we'll provide you with a free 30-minute onboarding call to get you up and running.

changePlan.question: Can I change my plan later?
changePlan.answer: Absolutely! You can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time from your account settings. We offer flexible options to fit your evolving needs.

cancellationPolicy.question: What is your cancellation policy?
cancellationPolicy.answer: You can cancel your subscription at any time through your account settings. If you cancel during the free trial, you won't be charged. For paid plans, you'll have access to the features until the end of your billing cycle.

changeEmail.question: Can I change my email address?
changeEmail.answer: Yes, you can update your email address in your account settings. Just go to the 'Profile' section and click on 'Edit Profile' to make the changes.

paidPlansBenefits.question: What are the benefits of paid plans?
paidPlansBenefits.answer: Paid plans offer enhanced features such as access to additional indices, local hyper-local weather forecasts, unlimited data history, and yield prediction. These features provide deeper insights and greater control over your agricultural operations.
